attributes.Sql Query:
SEL BK_SOLD_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY,
	BK_END_USER_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY
	FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE PTL,
	(SELECT MIN(CALENDAR_DATE) AS CALENDAR_DATE
	FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR
	WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_AGE = 2) TEMP
	WHERE PTL.TRANSACTION_DATE >= TEMP.CALENDAR_DATE
	GROUP BY BK_SOLD_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY,
	BK_END_USER_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY

SEL 
	BK_SOLD_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY
	,BK_END_USER_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY
	,SPK.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY SOLD_TO_PARTY_KEY
	,EPK.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY END_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY
	,COALESCE(PS.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_INT
	,COALESCE(PS.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,-999)  AS DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY
FROM $$STGDB.WI_CHNL_RET_PTL_PATTERNS PTLP
	INNER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_WIPS_CUSTOMER_SITE_TV SPK
	ON PTLP.BK_SOLD_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY = SPK.WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY
	AND SPK.END_TV_DATE  = '3500-01-01'
	INNER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_WIPS_CUSTOMER_SITE_TV EPK
	ON PTLP.BK_END_USER_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY = EPK.WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY
	AND EPK.END_TV_DATE  = '3500-01-01'
	LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER_SITE PS
	ON SPK.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY = PS.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
AND PS.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'

SELECT 
	 BK_SOLD_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY  
	,BK_END_USER_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY 
	,SOLD_TO_PARTY_KEY             
	,END_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY        
	,PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_INT    
	,DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY             
	,COALESCE(PART_CTRY.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE, 'UNK') PARTNER_COUNTRY
	,COALESCE(END_CTRY.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE, 'UNK') END_CUST_COUNTRY
FROM     $$STGDB.WI_CHNL_RET_PTL_PARTNERS  RPP
	LEFT OUTER JOIN (
		SELECT NPLA.LOCATOR_KEY, ISO_COUNTRY_CODE, PARTY_KEY
		FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_LOCATOR_ASGN NPLA
		INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_POSTAL_ADDRESS_LOCATOR NPAL
		ON NPLA.LOCATION_TYPE_CODE = 'POSTAL ADDRESS'
		AND NPLA.LOCATOR_KEY = NPAL.LOCATOR_KEY    
		INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_LOCATOR NL
		ON NPLA.LOCATOR_KEY = NL.LOCATOR_KEY    
		AND NL.SS_CODE='CR' ) PART_CTRY
	ON RPP.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_INT = PART_CTRY.PARTY_KEY 
	LEFT OUTER JOIN (
		SELECT NPLA.LOCATOR_KEY, ISO_COUNTRY_CODE, PARTY_KEY
		FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_LOCATOR_ASGN NPLA
		INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_POSTAL_ADDRESS_LOCATOR NPAL
		ON NPLA.LOCATION_TYPE_CODE = 'POSTAL ADDRESS'
		AND NPLA.LOCATOR_KEY = NPAL.LOCATOR_KEY
		INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_LOCATOR NL
		ON NPLA.LOCATOR_KEY = NL.LOCATOR_KEY    
		AND NL.SS_CODE='CR') END_CTRY
	ON  RPP.END_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY = END_CTRY.PARTY_KEY
